name: Rent/Buy wealth modeler
description: A rent-vs-buy wealth simulator that compares net worth over time across multiple scenarios. Configure rent or buy legs with rent growth, home appreciation and more to see which scenario comes out ahead.

name: Yes, Chef!
description: With Yes, Chef! you never have to spend more than a few clicks on figuring out what to make for dinner this week. It's a mealplan generator, random recipe discovery tool, and can serve as your own recipe book - all in one.

name: Cinemojis
description: Cinemojis is a game for movie buffs and emoji lovers. Guess a movie in 5 tries using 1 to 5 emojis. Users can also sign up and create their own movie-emoji sets to play or share with their friends and challenge them.
